penalties.description: The final loop position appears to be secured on the middle appendage but not precisely at the marked location near the base.

reasoning: The video shows a complete ligating loop task with loop material being positioned around the middle appendage and secured with a knot. The final hand inspection reveals the loop is secured on the appendage but appears slightly off from the optimal marked position near the base. The tail cutting phase is clearly visible at the end. Some frames show motion blur which affects precise assessment of the final knot position relative to the mark.
